name: Liu Shiwen
nameEn: LIU SHIWEN 路 Little Jujube 路 Five-time World Cup Champion

tags.text: 馃弳 World Cup Five-time Champion

timeline.subtitle: First World Cup Title
achievements: 馃弳 Women's World Cup Singles Champion (first major singles title)

timeline.subtitle: World Cup Defense
achievements: 馃弳 Women's World Cup Singles Champion (successful defense)

timeline.subtitle: World Cup Three-peat
achievements: 馃弳 Women's World Cup Singles Champion (three-peat)

timeline.subtitle: World Cup Four-time Champion
achievements: 馃弳 Women's World Cup Singles Champion (fourth title)

timeline.subtitle: Rio Olympic Team Gold
achievements: 馃 Rio Olympics Women's Team Gold

timeline.subtitle: Budapest World Championships Triumph 路 Five-time Champion
achievements: 馃弳 Budapest World Championships Women's Singles Champion (first world singles title)
馃弳 Women's World Cup Singles Champion (fifth title, most in history)
馃搶 Five-time World Cup champion, record-breaking

timeline.subtitle: Tokyo Olympic Mixed Doubles Silver
achievements: 馃 Tokyo Olympics Mixed Doubles Silver (with Xu Xin, lost to Mizutani/Ito in final)

timeline.subtitle: Fading from National Team
achievements: 馃搶 Gradually faded from national team
馃搶 Transitioned to league and promotional activities

achievements.title: 猸?World Cup Five-time Champion
achievements.description: Liu Shiwen won five Women's World Cup singles titles, the most in history. In 2019, she finally won the World Championships women's singles title, reaching her career peak. Unfortunately, she won silver in the Tokyo Olympics mixed doubles final, failing to complete a Grand Slam.
